query:
-- accessLogs: 화이트리스트 IP 삭제
DELETE FROM accessLogs WHERE ipAddress IN (
  '221.141.9.83',
  '112.221.224.125',
  '211.235.89.25',
  '2001:2d8:71a3:b0c2:2c69:8653:d08a:4d8f',
  '2001:2d8:2183:48bf::6089:339b',
  '::ffff:127.0.0.1',
  '127.0.0.1',
  '::1'
);

-- accessLogs: manus 미리보기 도메인 referer 삭제
DELETE FROM accessLogs WHERE referer LIKE '%manus.computer%' OR referer LIKE '%manus.space%';

-- eventLogs: 화이트리스트 IP 삭제
DELETE FROM eventLogs WHERE ipAddress IN (
  '221.141.9.83',
  '112.221.224.125',
  '211.235.89.25',
  '2001:2d8:71a3:b0c2:2c69:8653:d08a:4d8f',
  '2001:2d8:2183:48bf::6089:339b',
  '::ffff:127.0.0.1',
  '127.0.0.1',
  '::1'
);

-- eventLogs: owner 태그 삭제
DELETE FROM eventLogs WHERE ipAddress = 'owner';

-- 삭제 후 남은 데이터 확인
SELECT 'accessLogs' as tbl, COUNT(*) as remaining FROM accessLogs;
SELECT 'eventLogs' as tbl, COUNT(*) as remaining FROM eventLogs;
